PIPELINE_NOTE: Path B — IP-Adapter identity lock. Takes concept art as reference; generates character with matching visual identity from text prompt. REPLACE_INPUT_IMAGE = uploaded concept art (RGBA clean). REPLACE_PROMPT = style/pose description. Preset PLUS (high strength) requires ip-adapter-plus_sd15.bin + CLIP-ViT-H-14 in models/clip_vision/.

inputs.text: REPLACE_PROMPT, isometric game sprite, dark fantasy RPG, illustrated style, Hades game art, clean lineart, cel shaded, full body character, white background
blurry, photo-realistic, 3d render, nsfw, watermark, text, cropped, bad anatomy, extra limbs, deformed hands, fused fingers, horn, spike, pointy artifact, distorted hood, asymmetrical hood
